description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Preview Build that triggers on every pull request. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, set up .NET SDKs (3.1.x, 5.0.x, 6.0.x, 7.0.x, 8.0.x, and 9.0.x preview) and Node.js 16.x, prepare the AOT workload, build a preview site with npm and .NET, and upload the site artifact and PR number as artifacts.
